statement: Clotho Phase 1 is advisory / non-sandboxed. It does NOT prove complete JavaScript loader analysis, loader isolation, or loader containment. The deterministic scanner (D27/D32) is a trusted-code review signal, not a capability boundary or a sandbox.

The shared D33 scanner is a dependency-free lexical scanner correct over a closed source profile, NOT a complete ECMAScript parser. Out-of-profile inputs are REFUSED (fail closed with unsupported-module-lexical-profile), not parsed correctly.
Task 4a validates GENERIC ledger/scanner integrity against injected fixtures only; equality of coverage refs/counts with committed inventories is the Task 5 driver's job, not Task 4a's.

Task 4a commits the git and code weaver inventories/closures only (D17/AM-17). The test/doc/ledger weavers, the orchestrator inventory, atomic publication (D20/D28), and D34 re-derivation are LATER tasks (4b/5), not present or claimed here.
